TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Petro_Poroshenko, title = Petro_Poroshenko, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Petro_Poroshenko} }

S.FORM: = Petro Poroshenko = Mntucing hngkawas 1965 idas 9 jiyax 26 ka Petro Poroshenko ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Ukraine ta sayang o kiya ka Petro Poroshenko, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 6 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. His presidential term ended on 20 May 2019. == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = p…ôt…ĺo po…ĺosńß…ônko = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka p…ôt…ĺo po…ĺosńß…ônko ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan uk…ĺain…ô ta sajaŇč o kija ka p…ôt…ĺo po…ĺosńß…ônko, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ńßis p…ĺ…ôsid…ôntial t…ô…ĺm …ônd…ôd on ** maj ****. == pnjańßan pnatas ==
S.FORM: = Petro Poroshenko = Mntucing hngkawas 1965 idas 9 jiyax 26 ka Petro Poroshenko ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Ukraine ta sayang o kiya ka Petro Poroshenko, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 6 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. His presidential term ended on 20 May 2019. == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = p…ôt…ĺo po…ĺosńß…ônko = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka p…ôt…ĺo po…ĺosńß…ônko ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan uk…ĺain…ô ta sajaŇč o kija ka p…ôt…ĺo po…ĺosńß…ônko, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ńßis p…ĺ…ôsid…ôntial t…ô…ĺm …ônd…ôd on ** maj ****. == pnjańßan pnatas ==
